error: Host build failed because the generated op_host source included a random-suffixed tiling header name that did not match the actual generated header file.
code_diff: Rename the operator from `GoogLeNetInceptionV1Custom` to `GooglenetInceptionV1Custom` so the project generator emits a stable `googlenet_inception_v1_custom_tiling.h` include path instead of splitting `GoogLeNet` into `goog_le_net`.
summary: Mixed-case CamelCase names like `GoogLeNet...` can be split incorrectly by the project generator and break the auto-generated tiling include. Use a simpler op class name such as `GooglenetInceptionV1Custom` to keep generated source/header names aligned.

error: AscendC compile failed with `cast between floating and unsigned integer variable is not allowed in aicore function` in `GlobalAvgPool2d`.
code_diff: Remove `static_cast<float>(height * width)` and rewrite the average as `sum / spatialSize` with `spatialSize` kept as `uint32_t`.
summary: Avoid explicit integer-to-float `static_cast` inside aicore scalar code when a direct arithmetic rewrite is possible. Replacing `1.0F / static_cast<float>(n)` with `sum / n` removed the compile-time type restriction.

error: Runtime correctness execution failed with NPU error 507035 and `Illegal instruction, which is usually caused by unaligned UUB addresses` during the custom kernel execution.
code_diff: Refactor the kernel to reduce direct GM scalar writes: write convolution/pooling/linear outputs into `LocalTensor` buffers first and flush them back with contiguous `DataCopy`, instead of repeatedly calling `GlobalTensor::SetValue` on large intermediate tensors.
summary: For large fused kernels, repeated scalar `GlobalTensor::SetValue` writes to GM intermediates can trigger vector-core runtime faults. A safer pattern is to accumulate contiguous rows or planes in `LocalTensor`/UB buffers and write them back with `DataCopy`.
